prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait photograph of a young East Asian woman seated on a black vintage tufted leather sofa against a dark, textured concrete wall. She wears a dramatic deep crimson red velvet halter gown with a high neck, gathered draping, side cutouts, and a long flowing skirt. Pose her in a relaxed elegant three-quarter seated position: one arm raised with her hand in her tousled dark wavy ponytail, the other hand resting softly on her lap, head slightly tilted, looking directly at the camera with a calm alluring expression. Include exactly 2 visible accessories: small pearl drop earrings and a dark bracelet or hair tie on the raised wrist. Add exactly 2 sofa details: glossy black channel-tufted leather upholstery and a shaggy brown fur cushion on the left. Use moody low-key studio lighting with soft directional light from the upper right, gentle highlights on skin and velvet folds, deep shadows, subtle haze, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, and a refined fashion editorial mood. Vertical 9:16 composition, waist-to-knee framing with the red fabric cascading across the lower foreground, no text, no watermark.
